raw.subject: Something I noticed about Rock Hill Flower Market Shoppe
raw.body:
Hi,

You've been sharing beautiful photos of your flowers on Facebook.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which can make it harder for customers to find and book with you.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that could help you showcase your services, share photos, and make it easy for customers to get in touch. It includes a services overview, photo gallery, and contact section.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/rock-hill-flower-market-shoppe-rock-hill

Let's discuss how a simple website could help your business thrive on a flat fee basis. I'd appreciate the opportunity to chat with you about it.
